SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-30-2014 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
